creator: blaz@amis.net
text:
netsaint-plugins port as currently in the repository does not
compile at all.

This patch updates netsaint-plugins to 1.2.9.2, fixes pkg-plist when
different options are specified, adds radius support and mysql support.

Port is currently unmaintained so I set the maintainer to myself.

Still todo: LDAP support, postgresql support, fixes to netsaint port.

How-To-Repeat: 
Try to make netsaint-plugins and notice it fails.
